info.title: Fenergo Nebula Lookup Command
info.description:
**Lookup Command API**:


Lookup Command API provides endpoints that allow to load multiple entities into the system with a single action.


**Lookup Command API provides**:
  • The ability to create, update and delete Lookup Jobs.

post.summary: Create a new Lookup using values as the source of truth
post.description:
This method creates new Lookups with a first draft version. The new version initializes with the DTO data and has the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

500.description: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

messages.message: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

messages.message: This endpoint is obsolete and was terminated on yyyy-MM-dd

put.description:
Update the settings of a lookup, specifically the IsSystemLookup flag. To convert to a system lookup, set IsSystemLookup to (true), and to revert to a standard lookup set it to (false) This affect to all versions of a Lookup

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit

parameters.description: The Id of the existing model

post.summary: Create a new Version for an existing Lookup using Values as the source of truth
post.description:
This method creates a new Lookup version, using values as the source of truth The new version initializes with the DTO data. It is assigned the next available version number, the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit

parameters.name: lookupId
parameters.description: The Id of the existing model

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

requestBody.description: ServiceRequest with the new version data

delete.summary: Delete an existing Version of a Lookup
delete.description:
This method deletes the selected version of an existing Lookup. If the version is the last one, then the version number of it will become the next available one for the model. Otherwise, the version number will be flagged as Deleted and become unavailable.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorDelete

parameters.name: lookupId
parameters.description: Lookup Id

parameters.name: versionNumber
parameters.description: Version number to delete

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

ids.description: The list of lookups'UiDs sent by user to be deleted

effectiveFrom.description: The date that the version takes effect when published

notes.description: Optional description of the references and details of changes made that will be visible to all users who can access the version. It's assumed that version notes won't contain 'personal identifiable information'. Please note that having many versions with very long notes could hurt API performance in the long term.
